params.name: Monroe's Pencil
params.description:
On Feb 5, 1812 AD, William Monroe made the first pencil in the world.
By inlaying a piece of graphite in the groove bar of wood, an American carpenter named William Monroe made the first wood pencil in the world. Moreover, he also invented the pencil-making machine that was able to cut the wood into slats and create a groove for the lead. This pencil-making technique lasted for more than two hundred years.
